name: Micro-Wave Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together peanuts, sugar, syrup, salt in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cook on high for 4 minutes.
3. Stir the mixture well, then cook another 4 minutes.
4. Add butter and vanilla to the peanut mixture, stirring until fully blended.
5. Return the mixture to the microwave and cook an additional 2 minutes.
- At this point, the peanuts will be slightly browned and the syrup hot.
6. Sprinkle baking soda over the mixture and gently stir until foamy.
7. Transfer the brittle to a plate lined with aluminum foil.
8. Allow it to cool completely, then break into pieces.
9. Store in an airtight container.
